products.name: Adobe Creative Cloud 1 Month Subscription
products.description: Adobe Creative Cloud 1 Month Subscription with fulfillment handled by SubSlush according to the listed delivery flow.

features: Includes access to all Adobe Creative Cloud applications, 4000 AI credits, can be used on 2 devices.
Does not include access to Software 3D.
metadata.info_box_text:
This offer provides private account access only, and the account is not shared with other users.
You will receive a new account with email and password.
After delivery, you can change the account password.
metadata.activation_guide:
Place your order.
You will receive a new private Adobe account with email and password.
Sign in and confirm Creative Cloud access is active.
Change the account password after delivery.

products.name: Adobe Creative Cloud 12 Months Subscription (Prepaid)
products.description: Adobe Creative Cloud 12 Months Subscription (Prepaid) with fulfillment handled by SubSlush according to the listed delivery flow.

features: Includes access to all Adobe Creative Cloud applications, 1TB cloud storage, 4000 AI credits per month (48000 credits per year), Generative Fill Text to Image and other AI features, can be used on 3 devices.
metadata.info_box_text:
This offer provides private account access only, and the account is not shared with other users.
You may change the account email and password, and enable your own 2FA authenticator.
The same account is used for the full 12-month prepaid term.
metadata.activation_guide:
Place your prepaid Adobe Creative Cloud 12-month order.
You will receive one private Adobe account for the full term.
Sign in and secure the account by changing email, changing password, and enabling your own 2FA authenticator.
Continue using the same account for the full 12-month subscription period.

products.name: Adobe Creative Cloud 3 Months Subscription
products.description: Adobe Creative Cloud 3 Months Subscription with fulfillment handled by SubSlush according to the listed delivery flow.

features: Includes access to all Adobe Creative Cloud applications, 4000 AI credits per month, can be used on 2 devices.
Does not include access to Software 3D.
metadata.info_box_text:
This offer provides private account access only, and the account is not shared with other users.
You will receive a new account with email and password.
A new account is delivered for each month in the term.
metadata.activation_guide:
Place your order for the 3-month package.
You will receive a new private Adobe account with email and password for the current month.
A new Adobe account is delivered again for each additional month in the term.
Use the latest delivered credentials each month and update password after delivery if needed.

products.name: Adobe Creative Cloud 6 Months Subscription
products.description: Adobe Creative Cloud 6 Months Subscription with fulfillment handled by SubSlush according to the listed delivery flow.

features: Includes access to all Adobe Creative Cloud applications, 4000 AI credits per month, can be used on 2 devices.

metadata.info_box_text:

metadata.activation_guide:
Place your order for the 6-month package.
You will receive a new private Adobe account with email and password for the current month.
A new Adobe account is delivered again for each additional month in the term.
Use the latest delivered credentials each month and update password after delivery if needed.

products.name: Amazon Prime Video 1 Month Subscription
products.description: Amazon Prime Video 1 Month Subscription with fulfillment handled by SubSlush according to the listed delivery flow.

features: Includes all access to Amazon Prime Video features.
Includes access to Luna Games.
Does not include access to Prime Video Ultra, or Amazon Prime for making purchases on the Amazon marketplace.
metadata.info_box_text:
This offer provides private account access only, and the account is not shared with anyone else.
You may change the email and password and manage the account.
This product is for standalone Amazon Prime Video only, and Prime Video Ultra is not included.
Do not use this account for Amazon shopping orders, or the account may be suspended with no replacement or refund.
metadata.activation_guide:
Place your order and receive private account credentials.
Sign in and update email/password if you want to manage the account yourself.
Use the account only for standalone Amazon Prime Video (Prime Video Ultra is not included).
Do not place Amazon shopping orders on this account, or it may be suspended with no replacement or refund.

products.name: Apple TV 1 Month Subscription
products.description: Apple TV 1 Month Subscription with fulfillment handled by SubSlush according to the listed delivery flow.

features: Includes access to all Apple TV features.
Can be accessed through the official Apple TV application on Smart TVs, or through web browser for computer & smartphones (PC, Mac, Android and iOS).
Mobile application login on phones or tablets are not supported.
metadata.info_box_text:
This offer provides private account access only, and the account is not shared with anyone else.
The account is created and managed by SubSlush, and it does not include email access, password changes, or security setting changes.
For Smart TVs, the product works through the official Apple TV application.
For PC, Mac, Android, and iOS, access is through the web browser only; mobile application login on phones or tablets is not supported.
metadata.activation_guide:
Place your order and receive Apple TV account access.
For Smart TVs, use the official Apple TV app.
For PC, Mac, Android, and iOS, use a web browser only; mobile app login on phones/tablets is not supported.
This account is managed by SubSlush, so email access, password changes, and security setting changes are not included.

products.name: ChatGPT Pro 1 Month Subscription
products.description: ChatGPT Pro 1 Month Subscription with fulfillment handled by SubSlush according to the listed delivery flow.

features: Includes everything in Plus and:
Unlimited GPT‑5.4 messages, with generous access to GPT‑5.4 Thinking, and limited access to GPT‑5.4 Pro
60+ apps that bring your tools and data into ChatGPT—like Slack, Google Drive, SharePoint, GitHub, Atlassian, and more
Business features like apps, data analysis, record mode, canvas, shared projects, and custom workspace GPTs
Encryption at rest and in transit, and no training on your data by default.
Includes access to Codex and ChatGPT agent for reasoning and taking action across your documents, tools, and codebases
metadata.info_box_text:
This offer provides private account access only, and the account is not shared with anyone else.
You may change the email and password.
The account includes access to a ChatGPT Pro workspace with the listed features and limitations.
metadata.activation_guide:
Place your order.
You will receive a private account with login credentials.
Sign in and update email/password if preferred.
Use the included ChatGPT Pro workspace features according to the listed feature set and limitations.

products.name: Linked Premium Career 3 months
products.description: Linked Premium Career 3 months with fulfillment handled by SubSlush according to the listed delivery flow.

features: Includes LinkedIn Premium Career features such as LinkedIn Premium access for 3 months, InMail credits, "Who viewed your profile" insights, Full LinkedIn learning library access,
Faster networking & smarter outreach tools.
metadata.info_box_text:
This product is delivered as an activation link that you redeem on your own LinkedIn account.
It can only be applied to an account that has never used a LinkedIn offer before.
Please verify eligibility before purchase, because delivered activation links cannot be reversed or refunded.
metadata.activation_guide:
Before purchasing, confirm your LinkedIn account has never used a Premium offer before.
Place your order and receive the activation link.
Log in to your LinkedIn account and open the activation link to apply the plan.
If the account has used a previous offer, activation may fail, and delivered links cannot be reversed or refunded.

products.name: LinkedIn Premium Business 12 months
products.description: LinkedIn Premium Business 12 months with fulfillment handled by SubSlush according to the listed delivery flow.

features: Includes all LinkedIn Premium Business features.
metadata.info_box_text:
This product is delivered as an upgrade or renewal on your own LinkedIn account.
During checkout, provide your LinkedIn email and password so SubSlush can complete manual fulfillment.
For security, we recommend using a temporary password first and changing it back after activation is completed.
metadata.activation_guide:
Before checkout, change your LinkedIn password to a temporary one.
During checkout, provide your LinkedIn email and temporary password for manual fulfillment.
SubSlush applies the Premium Business upgrade or renewal directly to your account.
After activation is completed, sign in, confirm access, and change your password again to a private one.

products.name: LinkedIn Sales Navigator 12 months
products.description: LinkedIn Sales Navigator 12 months with fulfillment handled by SubSlush according to the listed delivery flow.

features: Includes all LinkedIn Sales Navigator features.

metadata.activation_guide:

During checkout, provide your LinkedIn email and temporary password for manual fulfillment.
SubSlush applies the Sales Navigator upgrade or renewal directly to your account.
After activation is completed, sign in, confirm access, and change your password again to a private one.

products.name: Lovable (100 credits) 1 Month Subscription
products.description: Lovable (100 credits) 1 Month Subscription with fulfillment handled by SubSlush according to the listed delivery flow.

features: Includes access to all Loveable features, including 100 credits.
metadata.info_box_text:
This product is delivered as a new workspace to your Loveable account.
The workspace includes 100 credits that are available for 30 days.
metadata.activation_guide:
During checkout, provide the email linked to your Lovable account.
SubSlush delivers a new workspace to that account.
Open the workspace and confirm 100 credits are available.
Use the credits within 30 days, since this subscription period is 1 month.

products.name: Myfitnesspal Premium 12 months
products.description: Myfitnesspal Premium 12 months with fulfillment handled by SubSlush according to the listed delivery flow.

features: Includes access to all Myfitness Premium features.
metadata.info_box_text:
This offer provides private account access only, and the account is not shared with anyone else.
You will receive a new account with email and password.
After delivery, you can change both the email and password.
metadata.activation_guide:
Place your order for the product.
You will receive a new private MyFitnessPal account with email and password.
Sign in and confirm Premium access is active.
Change the account email and password to your own details after delivery.

products.name: n8n Starter 12 Months Subscription
products.description: n8n Starter 12 Months Subscription with fulfillment handled by SubSlush according to the listed delivery flow.

features: Includes access to all n8n Starter features.
metadata.info_box_text:
This product is delivered as an upgrade or renewal on your own n8n account, or to a newly provisioned account when you choose Upgrade New Account.
For Upgrade Own Account, provide your n8n email and password during checkout for manual fulfillment, and using a temporary password is recommended.
metadata.activation_guide:
At checkout, choose Upgrade Own Account or Upgrade New Account.
If upgrading your own account, provide your n8n email and a temporary password for manual fulfillment.
If upgrading a new account, SubSlush provisions the account and applies the plan for you.
After activation, confirm access is active and change your password back if you shared credentials.

products.name: Netflix Basic 1 Month
products.description: Netflix Basic 1 Month with fulfillment handled by SubSlush according to the listed delivery flow.

features: Unlimited ad-free movies, TV shows, and games
Watch on 1 supported device at a time
Watch in 720p (HD)
Download on 1 supported device at a time
metadata.info_box_text:
This offer provides private account access only, and the account is not shared with anyone else.
The account is provisioned and managed by SubSlush, and the same account can be used for renewals by purchasing another Netflix product from SubSlush.
A VPN may be required in the first month due to Netflix region locks.
For 1-month terms, free VPN access is not included, so you must use your own VPN if needed.
metadata.activation_guide:
Place your order and receive your managed Netflix account credentials.
Sign in and use this same account for future renewals if you buy another Netflix product from SubSlush.
A VPN may be required during the first month due to region locks; for this 1-month product, you must use your own VPN if needed.
After the first month, region locks are typically removed.

products.name: Netflix Basic 12 Months
products.description: Netflix Basic 12 Months with fulfillment handled by SubSlush according to the listed delivery flow.

features: Unlimited ad-free movies, TV shows, and games
Watch on 1 supported device at a time
Watch in 720p (HD)
Download on 1 supported device at a time
metadata.info_box_text:
This offer provides private account access only, and the account is not shared with anyone else.
The account is provisioned and managed by SubSlush, and the same account can be used for renewals by purchasing another Netflix product from SubSlush.
A VPN may be required in the first month due to Netflix region locks; SubSlush provides free VPN access for the first subscription period on 3, 6, and 12 month terms.
The Netflix subscription is automatically renewed each month on the same account for the full 12-month term.
metadata.activation_guide:
Place your order and receive your managed Netflix account credentials.
Sign in and use the same account for the full term; the subscription renews automatically each month for 12 months.
If region lock applies in the first month, SubSlush will provide access to a VPN free of charge.
Continue using the same account for ongoing access and future renewals.

Place your order and receive your managed Netflix account credentials.
Sign in and use the same account for the full term; the subscription renews automatically each month for 6 months.
If region lock applies in the first month, SubSlush will provide access to a VPN free of charge.
Continue using the same account for ongoing access and future renewals.

products.name: Notion Plus 12 months
products.description: Notion Plus 12 months with fulfillment handled by SubSlush according to the listed delivery flow.

features: Access to all Notion plus features. AI credits are not included.
metadata.info_box_text:
This offer provides private account access only, and the account is not shared with other users.
You receive access to the email account connected to this Notion account.
Delivery is under an existing Notion workspace, so creating a separate paid workspace on this account is not supported.
Your projects remain private unless you explicitly share them, and you may update credentials and security settings after delivery.
metadata.activation_guide:
During checkout, place your order for Notion account access.
You will receive Notion login details plus access to the connected email account.
Sign in to the existing managed Notion workspace; creating a separate paid workspace on this account is not supported.
After delivery, you may update credentials and security settings; your projects remain private unless you explicitly share them.

products.name: Perplexity Pro 12 Months Subscription
products.description: Perplexity Pro 12 Months Subscription with fulfillment handled by SubSlush according to the listed delivery flow.

features: Includes access to all Perplexity Pro features.
metadata.info_box_text:
This product is delivered as an activation code that you redeem on your own Perplexity account.
The code can only be applied to a Perplexity account that has never had a Perplexity Pro subscription before.
metadata.activation_guide:
Use a Perplexity account that has never had Perplexity Pro before.
Place your order and receive your activation code.
Log in to your eligible Perplexity account and redeem the code.
Confirm Pro access is active on that same account.

products.name: Spotify Premium 1 month
products.description: Spotify Premium 1 month with fulfillment handled by SubSlush according to the listed delivery flow.

features: Access to all Spotify Premium features.
Does not include access to Spotify audiobooks.
metadata.info_box_text:
This product is delivered as an upgrade or renewal on your own Spotify account, or to a newly provisioned account when you choose Upgrade New Account.
For Upgrade Own Account, provide your Spotify email and password during checkout for manual fulfillment, and using a temporary password is recommended.
The account must not have an active subscription at activation time.
The plan can be applied to Spotify accounts globally, and region may be adjusted during fulfillment while keeping full Premium feature access.
metadata.activation_guide:
At checkout, choose Upgrade Own Account or Upgrade New Account.
If upgrading your own account, make sure there is no active Spotify subscription, then provide Spotify email and temporary password.
SubSlush applies the upgrade or renewal (region may be adjusted if required for activation); new-account orders receive credentials after setup.
After activation, sign in and confirm Premium access, then change your password back if you shared credentials.

products.name: Youtube Premium 12 Months Subscription

features: Includes access to all Youtube Premium features.
metadata.info_box_text: This product is delivered as an activation link that you redeem on your own YouTube account.

Open the activation link while signed in to that account.
Complete redemption and confirm YouTube Premium is active.
